texto: May it be long before the people of the United States shall cease to take a deep and pervading interest in the Fourth of July, as the birthday of our national life, or the event which then occurred shall be subordinated to any other of our national history.
explicacao: Citação de Samuel Freeman Miller sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “May it be long before the people of the United States shall cease to take a deep and pervading in…” articula vida, history, deep em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como aniversario e history.

texto: Of the judicial department of the Government, the Supreme Court is the head and representative, and to it must come for final decision all the great legal questions which may arise under the Constitution, the laws, or the treaties of the United States.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Samuel Freeman Miller sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Of the judicial department of the Government, the Supreme Court is the head and representative, a…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, great, decision, útil em momentos de decision e government.
